program.name: SLA Policy Refusal
intake.purpose: Refuse to route an incident when the mandate lacks the SLA policy fields required for a deterministic owner and response target.
intake.stages_json: [{"slug":"intake","is_bootstrap":true},{"slug":"surface_gap","domain_spec":{"reads":["inputs.initial_user_text.request","inputs.initial_user_text.known_policy"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","status":"refused","gap_type":"string","missing_fields":"string[]","next_action":"string"},"items_json":"string[]"},"rules":["Parse input.domain[\"inputs.initial_user_text\"] as JSON.","A deterministic incident routing decision requires severity_matrix, queue_mapping, and response_minutes.","If any required SLA policy field is absent from the request or known_policy, refuse to route the incident.","missing_fields must contain exactly the required SLA policy fields that are absent: severity_matrix, queue_mapping, response_minutes.","status must be refused, gap_type must be missing_sla_policy, and next_action must be request_sla_policy."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal surface_gap.","Do not produce owner_queue, response_due, approved, denied, or escalation target fields.","items_json must list missing:<field> entries for each missing SLA policy field."]}},{"slug":"refused","is_terminal":true}]
